title: Intensely Fried Southern Thai Fish Noodles
description: A fatty and silky Southern Thai dish featuring shredded fish and deep-fried noodles, perfect for a post-workout meal.
instructions: Heat the vegetable oil in a deep frying pan to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
Deep-fry the rice noodles in batches until golden brown and crispy.
Remove the noodles from the oil and place them on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
In a separate pan, heat 1 tablespoon of vegetable oil over medium heat and saute the garlic and shallots until fragrant.
Add the fish balls to the pan and stir-fry until cooked through.
In a small bowl, whisk together the fish sauce, lime juice, palm sugar, and chili flakes.
Pour the sauce over the fish balls and stir-fry for an additional 2 minutes.
To assemble the dish, place the deep-fried noodles in a bowl and top with the fish ball mixture.
Garnish with additional chili flakes and lime wedges if desired.
